parsed_review.summary: CP00-508 is a descriptor-only Governance Core (RP16) P08 implementation slice, risk B, 40 units (RP16.P08.M03.S01-RP16.P08.M04.S18). All pack metadata, deliverable/micro-title/micro-phase distributions, required public exports, contract projection, validator script, tests, README, and manifest are mutually consistent and match the review baseline. The descriptor-only/no-write/no-real-data boundary is enforced everywhere via freezeCp508Result and the no-write attestation chain (synthetic_only, no_real_data true; all runtime-dispatch, DB-write, object-storage, and emits_hermes_runtime_receipt flags false). The authority boundary holds: validators and tests assert claude_is_final_approval false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval false, and claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation false; the runner is read-only (Read,Grep,Glob). Review hardening blockers (auth failure, zero-byte, malformed/fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, missing fields) are present in forbidden_review_evidence, and the readiness auth-preflight passed with valid JSON. Crucially the pack does not overclaim: production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, implementation_layer=descriptor, status implemented_pending_review; production_ready_candidate is gated only on coverage+slice validity. All 27 evidence commands exit 0 and Hermes gate H16 passed. Hermes patterns are used solely for deterministic descriptor review packet/receipt handling, not product runtime. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
